name: ninjaone-mcp
description: Query and manage NinjaOne RMM data — devices, organizations, tickets, alerts, and software — for MSP AI agents.
long_description: Use this server when you need to automate or query NinjaOne RMM. List and filter devices by organization, class, or online status; get device details and installed software; reboot devices; manage Windows services; list organizations and their device counts; search and manage helpdesk tickets; and acknowledge or resolve alerts. Uses OAuth2 client_credentials. Call ninjaone_navigate first to load the tools for a specific domain.

ninjaone_region.title: NinjaOne Region (optional)
ninjaone_region.description: Optional. Leave blank to use the vendor default (us → https://app.ninjarmm.com). Valid values: us, eu (https://eu.ninjarmm.com), ca, oc, us2, fed. Only set if your NinjaOne instance is on a non-US region.
